sentences.arabic: النَّخْلَةُ شَجَرَةٌ مُهِمَّةٌ فِي البِيئَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Palma je važno drvo u arapskom okruženju.
sentences.translationEn: The palm tree is an important tree in the Arab environment.

sentences.translation: Palma daje slatke i ukusne hurme.
sentences.translationEn: The palm tree produces sweet and delicious dates.
The farmer grows palm trees in oases.

sentences.arabic: النَّخِيلُ يُعْطِي ظِلًّا فِي الصَّحْرَاءِ الحَارَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Palme daju hlad u vrućoj pustinji.
sentences.translationEn: Palm trees provide shade in the hot desert.

sentences.translation: Palma je simbol dobrote i darežljivosti.
sentences.translationEn: The palm tree is a symbol of goodness and giving.
